name: Serena Hotel Gisenyi
desc: Luxury beachfront resort with world-class amenities.

name: Lake Kivu Serena Hotel
desc: Iconic luxury stay with lake views and garden pools.

name: Hakuna Matata Lodge
desc: Cozy lakeside lodge with a vibrant local atmosphere.

name: Palm Garden Resort
desc: Quiet retreat perfect for long stays and relaxation.

name: Gorillas Lake Kivu Hotel
desc: Modern hotel with excellent business and leisure facilities.

name: Discover Rwanda Gisenyi Beach
desc: The most popular vibe-spot for backpackers and young travelers.

name: Tam Tam Beach
desc: The heartbeat of Gisenyi nightlife. Best vibe on the beach.

name: Petit Bruxelles
desc: Authentic Belgian-Rwandan fusion dining with lake breeze.

name: Bistro du Lac
desc: Refined dining experience featuring local Lake Kivu fish.

name: Caliente Club
desc: Late night vibe with local DJs and high energy.

name: Inzozi Beach
desc: Crystal clear water and golden sands. The perfect morning chill spot.

name: Gisenyi Public Market
desc: Full details on local crafts, fresh fruits, and daily Gisenyi life.

name: Brasserie Bralirwa
desc: The famous brewery. A landmark of industrial history in the region.

name: Hot Springs (Amashyuza)
desc: Natural volcanic hot springs. A must-visit therapeutic experience.

name: Rubavu Mountain Viewpoint
desc: Highest point for a panoramic view of Gisenyi and Goma.
